critic.diagnosis: Very similar layout, same two-panel structure, same data series, colors, markers, and value labels matching the reference. Minor differences: generated version appears slightly more compressed vertically with a different aspect ratio, font rendering differs (looks like LaTeX/serif vs sans-serif in reference), title is not bold, and some label positions overlap more tightly (e.g., '64%/64%' and '52%/50%' at epoch 0). The 'pass threshold (3.0)' annotation is positioned mid-plot rather than right-aligned. Overall shapes and trends are preserved.
